query:
SELECT sessionId, COUNT(*) as tradeCount, SUM(realizedPnl) as totalPnl, MIN(closedAt) as earliest, MAX(closedAt) as latest
FROM paperTrades 
WHERE userId = 1
GROUP BY sessionId
ORDER BY sessionId DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT sessionId, COUNT(*) as tradeCount, SUM(realizedPnl) as totalPnl, MIN(closedAt) as earliest, MAX(closedAt) as latest
FROM paperTrades 
WHERE userId = 1

ORDER BY sessionId DESC
LIMIT 5;
